'''âsh-r-r''' ('''shasharar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:necrobump|necrobump]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-r-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:necrobump|necrobump]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-r-r
|-
! Lemma
| shasharar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisharar|thisharar]] || [[word:jisharar|jisharar]] || [[word:shisharar|shisharar]] || [[word:kisharar|kisharar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusharar|thuthusharar]] || [[word:jujusharar|jujusharar]] || [[word:shushusharar|shushusharar]] || [[word:kukusharar|kukusharar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusharar|thusharar]] || [[word:jusharar|jusharar]] || [[word:shusharar|shusharar]] || [[word:kusharar|kusharar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusharar|thusharar]] || [[word:jusharar|jusharar]] || [[word:shusharar|shusharar]] || [[word:kusharar|kusharar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesharar|thesharar]] || [[word:jesharar|jesharar]] || [[word:shesharar|shesharar]] || [[word:kesharar|kesharar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosharar|thothosharar]] || [[word:jojosharar|jojosharar]] || [[word:shoshosharar|shoshosharar]] || [[word:kokosharar|kokosharar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosharar|thosharar]] || [[word:josharar|josharar]] || [[word:shosharar|shosharar]] || [[word:kosharar|kosharar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosharar|thosharar]] || [[word:josharar|josharar]] || [[word:shosharar|shosharar]] || [[word:kosharar|kosharar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsharar|thĂŠsharar]] || [[word:jĂŠsharar|jĂŠsharar]] || [[word:shĂŠsharar|shĂŠsharar]] || [[word:kĂŠsharar|kĂŠsharar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasharar|thathasharar]] || [[word:jajasharar|jajasharar]] || [[word:shashasharar|shashasharar]] || [[word:kakasharar|kakasharar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasharar|thasharar]] || [[word:jasharar|jasharar]] || [[word:shasharar|shasharar]] || [[word:kasharar|kasharar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasharar|thasharar]] || [[word:jasharar|jasharar]] || [[word:shasharar|shasharar]] || [[word:kasharar|kasharar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasharar|shasharar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasharar|goshasharar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasharar|gokishasharar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashararnĂŒ|shashararnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashararnknĂŒ|goshashararnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashararnĂŒ|gokishashararnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashararshĂ«|shashararshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashararnkshĂ«|goshashararnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashararshĂ«|gokishashararshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashararo|shashararo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashararnkro|goshashararnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashararo|gokishashararo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashararmu|shashararmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashararnkmu|goshashararnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashararmu|gokishashararmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashararsher|shashararsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashararnksher|goshashararnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashararsher|gokishashararsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashararng|shashararng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashararnkng|goshashararnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashararng|gokishashararng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashararya|shashararya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashararnkya|goshashararnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashararya|gokishashararya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashararyam|shashararyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashararnkyam|goshashararnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashararyam|gokishashararyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashararnĂŒshĂ«|shashararnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashararnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashararnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashararnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashararnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashararnĂŒro|shashararnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashararnknĂŒro|goshashararnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashararnĂŒro|gokishashararnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashararnĂŒmu|shashararnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashararnknĂŒmu|goshashararnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashararnĂŒmu|gokishashararnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashararshĂ«nĂŒ|shashararshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashararnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashararnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashararshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashararshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashararshĂ«ro|shashararshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashararnkshĂ«ro|goshashararnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashararshĂ«ro|gokishashararshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashararshĂ«mu|shashararshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashararnkshĂ«mu|goshashararnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashararshĂ«mu|gokishashararshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashararonĂŒ|shashararonĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashararnkronĂŒ|goshashararnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashararonĂŒ|gokishashararonĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashararoshĂ«|shashararoshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashararnkroshĂ«|goshashararnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashararoshĂ«|gokishashararoshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashararomu|shashararomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashararnkromu|goshashararnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashararomu|gokishashararomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashararmunĂŒ|shashararmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashararnkmunĂŒ|goshashararnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashararmunĂŒ|gokishashararmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashararmushĂ«|shashararmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashararnkmushĂ«|goshashararnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashararmushĂ«|gokishashararmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashararmuro|shashararmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashararnkmuro|goshashararnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashararmuro|gokishashararmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
